Chat MID:UZQkbeI540znaMoEfVuS1ZJloaaK6lmDu69hgBrFZoc0
cURL Bash:curl 'https://line-chrome-gw.line-apps.com/api/talk/thrift/Talk/TalkService/getRecentMessagesV2' \
  -H 'accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'accept-encoding: gzip, deflate, br, zstd' \
  -H 'accept-language: en-US' \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -H 'priority: u=1, i' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua: " Not A;Brand";v="99", "Chromium";v="144", "Google Chrome";v="144"' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Windows"' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-dest: empty' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-mode: cors' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-site: none' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-storage-access: active' \
  -H 'user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/144.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' \
  -H 'x-hmac: LU4rWNKiXX8Wqh0fBG3HDHXBgXfh79WofBv6miyga1o=' \
  -H 'x-lal: en_US' \
  -H 'x-line-access: eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8iCl-7bHWec3AQ2JDywJKW2DQXcjJH066wtZS8ujq1g' \
  -H 'x-line-chrome-version: 3.7.1' \
  -b 'lct=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8iCl-7bHWec3AQ2JDywJKW2DQXcjJH066wtZS8ujq1g' \
  -H 'content-length: 51' \
  --data-raw '["UDg5gD_OxUWPooMXyYMAcR68tIz4H198Xk_JOyt6x8YE",50]'
